title: Wireless Mouse 2.4G Ergonomic Vertical Optical Mouse with Nano Receiver,4 Adjustable DPI 800/ 1200/ 1600/2400,Rechargeable Li-Battery,6 Buttons for Computer,Notebook, PC, Laptop, MacBook(Black)
description:
Ergonomic Design
Tired of using the traditional grip? Take a break from overly-clunky or uncomfortably tiny mice. The ergonomically-designed thumb rests and grips fit the contour of your palm for maximum comfort.
Easy-access use
Six buttons give you improved control over your computer's systems. Whether dragging and dropping, selecting large volumes of data, or casually gaming, this mouse provides a low-cost, effective solution for multiple computing needs.
Why Choose Us?
All Our Products are Produced under Strict Quality Inspection 30 Day Money-back Guarantee and 3-year limited hardware warranty Professional After-Sales Team to Make Things Right within 24hrs
Note:
The side buttons are not available for Mac OS because the system itself is a closed one, not open to the public, but the other function can be used normally.
Specifications:
Material: ABS Key number: 6 Buttons Resolution:800-1200-1600-2400DPI( One key switch) Wireless technology: 2.4GHz Operational range: 10m~15m/33ft~50ft Battery capacity: 650mAh rechargeable Li-Battery (built-in) Charging time: 2-3hours  Operation voltage: 3.7v  Operation current: <5mA Weight: 3.3oz/93g Dimensions: 4.05x 2.76x 2.75in/103x 70x57mm  Suitable for:Right handed,Programmer,Office staff,Student,internet surfers, gamers and people who work at length at the computer Compatibility: Windows 8 / 7 / 10/ Vista / XP / 2000, Linux, Android; Mac OS X (NOTE: 1.The two thumb buttons are not recognized on the Mac OS X; 2.This wireless mouse is not compatible with Mac OS X El Capitan).
Package includes:
1x ifun Wireless Vertical Ergonomic Optical Mouse 1x 2.4G USB Nano receiver 1x Charging Cable
features: Built-in Rechargeable Li-Battery with Auto-sleep Function:The iFun Wireless Mouse has 650mA battery capacity,only about 3 hours full charging time needed and support 720 hours working.Enters power saving mode automatically after 8 minutes idle,press any button can wake it up,conserves power and extends product life.If the mice lack of power,connect the charging cable,then it can work simultaneously

Scientific Ergonomic Design with Next/Previous Buttons:Contoured shape, sweat-resistant ,skin-friendly finish,added next/previous buttons to browse web page faster,sturdy scroll wheel with rubber oil coating that prevents fingers from sliding,the ergonomic computer mouse allow for natural hand positioning and ultimate comfort. It eases tension on the wrist and hand for right-handed users.Encourages healthy natural "handshake" wrist and arm positions for smoother movement and less overall strain

4 Adjustable DPI Levels:800,1200,1600,2400, easily change the cursor sensitivity depending on your activity. Resolution Optical Tracking Technology provides more sensitivity than standard optical mice for smooth and precise tracking on a wide range of surfaces.Best for things that require precision like color correcting and photo edits or make it faster for browsing

Plug-and-play and Wide Compatibility:Comes with a USB Nano receiver, plug and play directly.2.4GHz wireless technology ensure longer working distance-up to 33ft in 360 degree with no interference.Well compatible with Mac OS X, Linux and all versions of Windows such as Windows7/8/10/XP etc. Fits for desktop, laptop, PC, Macbook and other devices
Warranty:We support 30 Day Money-back Guarantee and 3-year limited hardware warranty,feel free to contact with us,our service team are always ready to support

reviews.title: Love this mouse
reviews.text: Great color selection. Fits my hand well.

reviews.title: I'll never go back to a flat mouse
reviews.text: I was suffering from tennis elbow for months, badly, and nothing I did was making any difference.  I have a job typing about 10 hours a day, eight days a week:/ and did some research about posture and what could cause this.  Already had an ergo keyboard, so I bought this ergo mouse.  WOW.  Unbelievable how almost immediately the tennis elbow cleared up.  This was super easy to get use to.  I have small hands, and the size is perfect.  I will never use a flat mouse again.  So very glad I stumbled upon this.  Best money I've ever spent.  Oh, and I absolutely love the fact that I do not have to replace batteries every week!

reviews.title: Well designed mouse, nothing like it
reviews.text: I love picking out a color I will enjoy looking at, other than basic black or white mice. I wanted the blue one forever, and years ago I got one in pink instead of blue per their mistake. I just kept it. I used it and yes it still works, I really wanted the blue one so I took my time to look for another one just like it and yes it is hard to find this blue color. Beautiful. The fit is very smooth and soft and perfect, they know what hands like to rest in a cupped shape and this is comfortable to work with. The glide is excellent and can be used for everyday, office, or gaming. Take a look around at other styles but you will not find one that fits like this ergonomically for the price which you cannot beat. The best part is that it is rechargeable and yes it comes with the cord and also you can use it while it is charging. Keep your wrist happy and get one.

reviews.title: Great ergonomic feel!
reviews.text: This is a great wireless mouse! It has been wonders to my carpel tunnel on my hand and love the natural feel of this. All computer mouses should be made like this, it just makes sense when you first use it. Anyways, seems pretty sturdy and have had no complaints since receiving it. Smooth trailing, battery seems to last long and love that it goes to sleep mode when not in use. Also, love the color; it's exactly as pictured!

reviews.title: Nice. But too small...
reviews.text:
I normally use medium sized gloves. sometimes small.

This mouse was designed for smaller hands than mine.

It's a nice mouse. small, cheap, comfortable, works well. the scroll wheel was really fun to use. but it didn't work for my case.

reviews.title: Great battery life
reviews.text: I'm still not fully decided about how I feel about this mouse. But, I can talk about what I know so far. The packaging I got the mouse and was really nice, really simple, but easy to open. The mouse was easy to set up, and the RGB looks pretty cool. There is a really cool DPI changer function that makes gaming much easier, however, I can't recommend this mouse for gaming because the ergonomics are pretty trash. I have to cramp my hand like a claw over the top of the mouse and after long periods of use it does start hurting. The surface is also pretty slippery, so I found that my hand slips on the mouse all the time. The tracking however, is great! And I would have to say that biggest plus is the battery life. I got this about 2 weeks ago, charged it once, and it is yet to die! I think the features of this mouse are great, but I would not recommend it. Purely because of the ergonomics, if you are going to use this mouse often, then you probably should go if something more ergonomic.

reviews.title: Poor performance | no charge indicator
reviews.text: Highly susceptible to interference. Drags and lags.

reviews.title: Meh
reviews.text: I like the size and the LED colors.  The battery life is a little lackluster and it actually starts acting up when it's "tired".  I got it for my iPad but haven't used it a month or so b/c I got tired of her attitude.

reviews.title: Had 2 of these and they both died
reviews.text: Will never buy from this company again... the second one we bought froze and would not work again.. same as the first one.

reviews.title: Basic but functions well
reviews.text: I ordered a ‘LED Wireless Mouse, Uiosmuph G12 Slim Rechargeable Wireless Silent Mouse, 2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Silver)’ for review.  For the price point, this is a basic mouse.  The rotating light strip is a cool looking feature.  It is sleek in design.  It connected well with the dongle to my Surface Pro.  It glides well over a mouse pad.  It is rechargeable, which I prefer to battery operated.  The click of this mouse is quiet. The dongle slides into the bottom and of course it has already been lost.  I prefer the dongle to be stored in a closed compartment on a mouse.  It does not require recharging for several days of moderate use and seems to charge quickly.  Overall, for basic use, this mouse works well.

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text:
Very nice. Looks good, I like the gold edging more than I thought I would. A little small, but I barely notice. The mouse I WAS using was HUGE, and my entire palm rested on it. This one only covers ⅔ of my palm.

Very comfortable.

Have not played anything that could be considered a stress test. I like that you can turn it off, but I dislike that you have to remember to turn it off.

I cannot tell if it goes to sleep.

reviews.title: wireless mouse
reviews.text: My old wireless finally died - dropped too many times onto the hardwood floor.  I purchased one that was like the old one and this one.  This one is flatter.  I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text: This is a good value for the cost.  If you need something small and easy to carry around with you this is great. Especially right now I am between working from home but sometimes have to visit the office and the less and smaller items I carry, the better!  This is nice and slim and works great with my laptop.  I don't really like to use batteries but as long as you switch it off when not in use you will be able to get quite a bit of use out of one.

reviews.title: Loses Connection CONSTANTLY
reviews.text: I have to turn it off and on about 5x a day because it randomly loses connectivity. When I am using it or idle for less than 1 min.

title: Neises LED Bluetooth Mouse,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Pro/MacBook Air/iMac/mac/ipad/ipad pro,Wireless Mouse for Macboook Air/MacBook Pro/PC (Silver)
description:
✅Packing list: Instructions*1, LED rechargeable Bluetooth5.1 + 2.4G dual-mode mouse *1, 2.4g Nano USB receiver *1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line *1, USB C-type adapter *1
✅How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:
Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse.
✅ How to connect to iOS/iPad/Pro/Air/ Mini/ Phone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse
first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.)
(1) open tabletSettings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）
(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)
🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse?
🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
✅ How to use the 2.4G receiver mode:
Open the 2.4G receiver mode at the bottom of the mouse, remove the USB receiver at the bottom of the mouse,Plug the USB receiver into your computer's USB port and move the mouse to start working，If your laptop is a Type C port, first plug the Type C adapter into your laptop's Type C port, then plug the mouse's USB receiver into the Type C adapter, and then move the mouse to work
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
features: ERGONOMIC DESIGN： Good surface coating technology given you a skin-like touch feeling. User-friendly design provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and pocket-sized perfect for travel, Mute design keeps away annoying clicks.

Use the DPI mouse button on the screen: you are free to adjust the mouse sensitivity to match your activity. Provide 3 DPI levels (800-1200-1600). The higher the DPI, the faster the cursor moves on the screen
For all computers and laptops and ios13 / ios14 tablet/pro/Air / Phone / MAC / MacBook / Pro / air windows / chromebook / HP / Dell
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
BUILT-IN BATTERY: Built-in battery,easy to charge by micro usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.

reviews.title: Liked it until .....
reviews.text:
As I began typing, I liked the smooth, quite feel BUT quickly discovered that this keyboard does NOT have a 'Print Screen' key, which is vital when working. DO NOT Buy this if you need it for work. As you can see in the picture provided, the 'F11' key is NOT labeled.
F11 toggles from Full Screen back to regular screen. The first 4 keys at the top of the number key pad are TOTALLY UNNECESSARY.
1st key) Same function as Ctrl+C (Copy)
2nd key) Does Absolutely Nothing!
3rd key) Same function as Ctrl+V, (Paste)
4th key) Same function as Ctrl+X (Cut)
Had this keyboard followed the SAME FORMAT
The keyboard is overpriced to be missing a vital function as Print Screen Key.

reviews.title: you get what you pay for
reviews.text: these work but feel like crap.  Left and right click are terrible.  Sometimes when I left click, as the piece of plastic is coming back up, it goes under the right side.  Its like someone took a solid sheet of plastic and cut a line down the middle to allow you to press down on the left or right side, its terrible.  Scroll wheel feels fine.  DPI button just cycles through, no way to go up or down, just cycles through 3 modes.  Very uncomfortable.  For the price, you get two and both are exactly like this so I doubt its defective.  I only got these to control my streaming PC so its not a HUGE deal, but if youre getting these for daily use - DONT DO IT.  I can hardly put up with these and I use them for maybe 10 mins a day.  Pay 15$ for one mouse.  I honestly feel like I could crush these with my hand - thats how crappy they feel.  They also go to sleep mode after like 5 mins so I have to constantly click it to wake it up, and it ends up opening apps.  Not worth the 15$

reviews.title: Too cute!

reviews.title: Works well, when it connects.  Update:  It loses connection WAY too much
reviews.text:
I like the mouse. Excellent value for money, except for one very annoying flaw. It is constantly disconnecting the bluetooth connection from my new Macbook Pro. It's pretty annoying.

After what feels like only a few minutes of idle time, the mouse bluetoothe disconnects. Then when I move it nothing happens for a couple seconds. The finally, it connects and my laptop tells me the mouse is back, and it works perfectly... until the next time it is idle.

I have use other low cost brands as well as my Apple Magic Mouse (which I don't use as I prefer a track wheel). I have not had any issues with the Bluetooth on those, only this one...

If it were not for the disconnect issue I would rate the mouse a 5 star. Otherwise, I give it a 3. I am still using it for now, but will find a better one...

UPDATE: Okay, I find that I am CONSTANTLY drustrated that this mouse loses connection with my laptop. PITA. Not worth using at any price.

reviews.text: Even after swapping out the battery, and making sure it’s in pairing mode, it refuses to pair with any device I’ve tried and doesn’t show up in my Bluetooth menu as a visible device. It very briefly showed up on my Macbook as a keyboard, but never as a mouse, and now it won’t even do that. Save your money and get a mouse that will work.

reviews.text: Perfect and does the job. I had to google the instructions. But it’s super easy set up. Battery life is banging. I’d recommend. It’s light and not super quality,but it’s doing the job and it’s light and comfy. Recommend.

reviews.title: Impressed!
reviews.text: This was everything I was looking for in a mouse; matte finish, silent clicks, mouse speed options, and easy connectivity! I like a flatter mouse as I find them easier to use for gaming or anything that needs a lot of movement, and the noiseless clicks make it that much easier to stay up for late-night sessions without annoying any roommates/others trying to sleep. Super easy set-up, my laptop recognized the mouse and connected to it as soon as I inserted the USB. All in all, very happy with this mouse!

reviews.title: Easy to hook up
reviews.text: Very simple hook up, just plug and go. Only had it for a day so I'm not sure about the battery life yet. But so far, so good.

reviews.title: Not good with MacBook
reviews.text: Not working for MacBook properly, cursor struck frequently
